WisePartners AB found in invoice footer, header branding, and shipping marks.
Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC found in invoice addressee block.

checkpoints.certificate_value: WisePartners AB, Viktor Rydbergsgatan 20, SE-412 56, Gothenburg, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: WisePartners AB, Viktor Rydbergsgatan 20, SE-412 56 Gothenburg (footer); WISE PARTNERS (header branding)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files and pages.
comparison_steps.detail: Consignor name 'WisePartners AB' found explicitly in invoice footer address block: 'WisePartners AB, Viktor Rydbergsgatan 20, SE-412 56 Gothenburg'. Also found as 'WISE PARTNERS' in header branding and 'WisePartners' in shipping marks. Exact name match after normalization.
Invoice footer shows 'SE-412 56 Gothenburg' (SE postal prefix) and 'Vat No. SE556753522301' (SE VAT prefix). Both confirm Sweden. Certificate says 'Sweden'. Land match confirmed.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Land verification via VAT prefix SE and postal code SE-412

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'WisePartners AB, Viktor Rydbergsgatan 20, SE-412 56, Gothenburg, Sweden'. Invoice footer: 'WisePartners AB, Viktor Rydbergsgatan 20, SE-412 56 Gothenburg, Vat No. SE556753522301'. The name 'WisePartners AB' matches exactly. The address matches exactly. Country Sweden confirmed via explicit SE-prefix in VAT number and postal code. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH. No further sequential testing (4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6) needed.
checkpoints.motivation: Consignor 'WisePartners AB' is explicitly found in the invoice footer with matching address and VAT prefix confirming Sweden. Direct name and country match via rule 4.1.0.

checkpoints.certificate_value: AL BAYAN PACKAGING INDUSTRY LLC, PO BOX 1985, WAREHOUSE C-7, NEW INDUSTRIAL AREA, UMM AL THOUB, UMM AL QUWAIN, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
checkpoints.invoice_value: Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC, PO Box 1985, Warehouse C-7, New Industrial Area, Umm Al Thoub, Umm Al Quwain, United Arab Emirates

comparison_steps.description: The invoice is addressed to 'Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC' at the top of the page, under the logo. This is the addressee/billing party (the goods are shipped 'for your account and risk'). No separate 'Invoice to' / 'Bill to' / 'Sold to' field exists, but the addressee block serves as the primary billing party.
comparison_steps.detail: Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC identified as the invoice addressee/buyer.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice addressee name.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'AL BAYAN PACKAGING INDUSTRY LLC'. Invoice: 'Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC'. After case normalization: identical.
Certificate: 'UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. Invoice: 'United Arab Emirates'. After case normalization: identical.

rules_applied.description: Invoice addressee block identified as primary billing party

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'AL BAYAN PACKAGING INDUSTRY LLC, PO BOX 1985, WAREHOUSE C-7, NEW INDUSTRIAL AREA, UMM AL THOUB, UMM AL QUWAIN, UNITED ARAB EMIRATES'. Invoice addressee: 'Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC, PO Box 1985, Warehouse C-7, New Industrial Area, Umm Al Thoub, Umm Al Quwain, United Arab Emirates'. After normalization of case: exact match on name, address, and country. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Consignee 'AL BAYAN PACKAGING INDUSTRY LLC' matches invoice addressee 'Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC' exactly after case normalization. Address and country (United Arab Emirates) also match exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in the certificate.
comparison_steps.detail: No article numbers are specified in the certificate goods description. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate and match against invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'Kraftliner'. Invoice goods description: 'Kraftliner'. Exact match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.5 - Priority 3: General description with invoice reference
comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains 'as per commercial invoice 20104403 dd 10.02.2026'. Verify invoice reference.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate references invoice number 20104403 dated 10.02.2026. Invoice number: 20104403, date: 10.02.2026. Both match exactly. Certificate contains explicit reference phrase 'as per commercial invoice'. Invoice content (Kraftliner) is consistent with certificate description (Kraftliner). Rule 4.3.5 satisfied.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' found exactly in invoice
Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens - invoice 20104403 dd 10.02.2026 verified

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: '89 reels Kraftliner as per commercial invoice 20104403 dd 10.02.2026'. Invoice goods: 'Kraftliner'. Identity-bearing main designation is 'Kraftliner' — found exactly in invoice. Additionally, certificate explicitly references invoice 20104403 dated 10.02.2026, which matches the invoice's number and date. Invoice content (Kraftliner) is fully consistent with certificate description. Both Priority 2 (text match) and Priority 3 (invoice reference) are satisfied. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'Kraftliner' in the certificate matches exactly with the invoice's goods description 'Kraftliner'. The certificate also references invoice 20104403 dated 10.02.2026, which matches the invoice exactly.

checkpoints.invoice_value: 89 reels; Net Weight 175,940 mt; Gross Weight 175,940 mt

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '175940 kg net'. This is the primary verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 value: 175940 kg net. Numeric value: 175940. Unit: kg. Weight category: net.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 175940 kg in the invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice states weights in 'mt' (metric ton): '175,940 Net Weight mt'. The value 175,940 mt is not 175940 kg directly. Need to check unit conversion.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 175940 kg net. Invoice: 175,940 Net Weight mt. Check if 175,940 mt = 175940 kg.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice value '175,940' with column header 'Net Weight mt'. The comma in '175,940' must be interpreted. If comma is a thousands separator: 175940 mt = 175,940,000 kg — this would be enormous and not match certificate's 175940 kg. If comma is a decimal separator: 175.940 mt = 175.940 × 1000 = 175940 kg — this matches certificate exactly. Given the context (89 reels of Kraftliner, price 570 USD per mt, total 100286 USD; 175.940 × 570 = 100,286 USD — exact match with total price), the comma is clearly a decimal separator. 175.940 mt × 1000 = 175,940 kg = 175940 kg. Certificate states 175940 kg net. MATCH via 3B conversion.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 6 states '89 reels'. Invoice states 'Number of Reels: 89' and 'TOTAL: 89'.
comparison_steps.detail: 89 reels in certificate matches 89 in invoice's 'Number of Reels' column. Direct numeric match.

comparison_steps.description: Check if any quantity in the invoice explicitly contradicts any quantity in the certificate.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice Gross Weight is also 175,940 mt (= 175940 kg). Certificate states 175940 kg net. The fact that GW and NW are equal in the invoice does not contradict the certificate's NW value. No explicit contradiction found.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 is verification-grounding quantity: 175940 kg net
Exception 3B - MT to KG conversion: 175.940 mt × 1000 = 175940 kg
Decimal notation normalization: '175,940' interpreted as 175.940 (decimal comma) based on price verification context
Additional quantity 89 reels verified; no contradictions

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: '175940 kg net'. Invoice column 'Net Weight mt': '175,940'. Interpretation: comma as decimal separator gives 175.940 mt. Conversion via 3B: 175.940 × 1000 = 175940 kg. This matches certificate exactly. Cross-validation: 175.940 mt × 570 USD/mt = 100,286 USD = invoice total. This confirms the decimal interpretation. Weight category: certificate says 'net', invoice column says 'Net Weight' — match. Additionally, 89 reels from Box 6 matches invoice's 89 reels. No contradictions found. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states 175940 kg net. Invoice states 175,940 (= 175.940) Net Weight mt. After MT→KG conversion (175.940 × 1000 = 175940 kg): exact match. Price cross-check confirms interpretation. 89 reels also matches.

checkpoints.invoice_value: the goods are of Australia origin

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin declaration in the invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains: 'We hereby certify that this Invoice is true and correct and that the goods are of Australia origin.' This is an explicit origin declaration.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin with invoice origin.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'Australia'. Invoice: 'Australia origin' → country = 'Australia'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via explicit declaration 'goods are of Australia origin'
Positive verification: Australia explicitly identified in invoice origin declaration

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3: 'Australia'. Invoice origin declaration: 'the goods are of Australia origin'. After normalization: both say 'Australia'. Exact match. Note: the certificate is issued as an EU Certificate of Origin (header says 'EUROPEAN UNION') but Box 3 explicitly states origin as 'Australia'. This is consistent — an EU COO can certify non-EU origin. The invoice confirms Australia origin. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states origin 'Australia'. Invoice explicitly declares 'the goods are of Australia origin'. Exact match.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-26D-463849 does not contain a bank-term LC designation.
PASS - All three criteria met: invoice number match, consignor identifiable, consignee identifiable.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - 'WisePartners AB' found explicitly in invoice footer.

Consignee priority order - primary billing field identification
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Invoice addressee block identified as primary billing party.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - Invoice 20104403 dd 10.02.2026 verified; content consistent.
175940 kg net identified as primary quantity.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Decimal notation normalization for MT conversion
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - Comma interpreted as decimal separator based on context (price verification: 175.940 × 570 = 100286 USD = invoice total).

rule_evaluation_log.description: Multiple quantities - at least one verified, no contradictions
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - Net weight verified via 3B; 89 reels verified directly. GW = NW in invoice, no contradiction.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Origin identification in invoice via explicit declaration
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - 'goods are of Australia origin' found in invoice.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Invoice value '175,940' represents 175940 mt (comma as thousands separator)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: If 175,940 meant 175940 mt, that would be 175,940,000 kg — absurdly large for 89 reels of Kraftliner. Also, 175940 mt × 570 USD/mt = 100,286,800 USD, which contradicts the invoice total of 100,286 USD. The only consistent interpretation is 175.940 mt (comma as decimal separator), which gives 175940 kg and 100,286 USD total.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate origin 'Australia' might conflict with EU Certificate of Origin header
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: An EU Certificate of Origin can certify goods of any origin, not just EU origin. The header 'EUROPEAN UNION' indicates the issuing framework (EU COO form), while Box 3 specifies the actual origin (Australia). There is no conflict.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren WisePartners AB, mottagaren Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC, varubeskrivningen Kraftliner, kvantiteten 175 940 kg netto (89 rullar) och ursprungslandet Australien kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Consignor WisePartners AB found in invoice footer with matching address and Swedish VAT prefix. Consignee Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC matches invoice addressee exactly. Goods description 'Kraftliner' matches directly; invoice reference 20104403 dd 10.02.2026 verified. Quantity 175940 kg net verified via MT→KG conversion (175.940 mt × 1000 = 175940 kg), confirmed by price cross-check. 89 reels also matches. Origin 'Australia' explicitly declared in invoice.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_detail: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. No MISMATCH found. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL. All checkpoint confidences ≥ 0.85 (minimum 0.97). No confidence-floor violation.
